# Overview

This dataset contains GA4 (Google Analytics 4) event data for the Google
Merchandise Store. Each row is a single event fired by a user on the site.

See [events_20210101](/tables/events_.md) for the core events table.

# Key Tables

- [events_](/tables/events_.md) — the core events table, one row per event.
